Affordable House Removals Services in West Midlands & Birmingham

Moving house is one of life's biggest milestones. Whether you are relocating to a new-build in Solihull or upsizing to a family home in Edgbaston, The Royals Removals makes your house move smooth, stress-free, and carefully handled from start to finish.

  • ✓ Fully insured & vetted professional team
  • ✓ Free no-obligation quotes in minutes
  • ✓ Same-day response & flexible move dates
  • ✓ Careful handling & damage protection guarantee
📝 Get a Quote 📱 WhatsApp Us

Trustpilot ★★★★★ Excellent
Google Reviews ★★★★★ 5.0 Rating

Our professional house removals service covers every step of your move — from packing and loading to transport and unloading at your new property. We work with homes of all sizes, from one-bedroom flats to large detached houses across Birmingham and the wider West Midlands.

Every house move is different, which is why we tailor our service to your exact requirements. Our experienced team handles your furniture, boxes, and personal belongings with the same care and attention as if they were our own. We understand how important your possessions are, and we take that responsibility seriously.

What's Included

  • ✓ Full house removals for all property sizes
  • ✓ Careful loading and unloading of all items
  • ✓ Professional furniture wrapping and protection
  • ✓ Dismantling and reassembly of beds, wardrobes, and tables
  • ✓ Fully equipped removal vans with blankets and straps
  • ✓ Friendly, uniformed, and experienced crew
  • ✓ Flexible scheduling including weekends
  • ✓ Free, no-obligation quotation

Why Choose The Royals Removals?

Choosing the right removal company for your house move is important. You want a team you can trust completely with your belongings. The Royals Removals has built its reputation on careful handling, honest pricing, and genuine customer care.

We arrive on time, communicate clearly throughout the day, and treat every item with respect. There are no hidden charges — the quote we give you is the price you pay. Our team is trained to handle fragile items, navigate tight stairways, and manage awkward access points that are common in Birmingham properties.

We know Birmingham inside out. From terraced streets in Balsall Heath to gated driveways in Sutton Coldfield, we have the local knowledge and experience to plan the most efficient route and approach for your move.

Affordable House Removals in Birmingham You Can Count On

Finding a removal company that actually delivers on its promises is not always straightforward. Plenty of families across Birmingham have been let down by no-shows, hidden charges, and careless handling. That is exactly why The Royals Removals has become the go-to name for house removals Birmingham residents trust.

Our house removals services cover everything from a one-bedroom flat in Digbeth to a five-bedroom family home in Sutton Coldfield. Every move is planned around your schedule, your property layout, and your specific requirements. There is no one-size-fits-all approach here — each job gets the attention it deserves.

What sets us apart from other house removal companies in Birmingham is simple: we turn up when we say we will, we handle your belongings as if they were our own, and the price we quote is the price you pay. No surprises, no extras, no excuses. Whether you are moving across the street or across the region, our team makes the process feel effortless.

Fully Insured & Professionally Protected

Every move we carry out is covered by comprehensive goods-in-transit insurance (up to £50,000) and public liability insurance (up to £5 million). You are in safe hands with our insured moving company in Birmingham.

🛡️
Public Liability

Up to £5 million cover

🚛
Goods in Transit

Up to £50,000 per move

✅
Every Move Covered

No exceptions, no exclusions

Who Is This Service For?

  • Families moving to a larger or smaller home
  • First-time buyers setting up their new property
  • Couples relocating within Birmingham
  • Tenants moving between rental properties
  • Homeowners downsizing or upsizing

Areas We Cover

We provide this service across Birmingham and the wider West Midlands.

Birmingham Dudley Sandwell Walsall Wolverhampton + View All Areas

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does a house removal in Birmingham cost? +
The cost depends on the size of your property, the volume of belongings, distance between addresses, and access at both locations. We provide a free, no-obligation quote tailored to your specific move — there are no hidden fees.
How far in advance should I book a house removal? +
We recommend booking at least two to four weeks in advance, especially during peak periods such as summer months and bank holidays. However, we do our best to accommodate last-minute moves when availability allows.
Do you dismantle and reassemble furniture? +
Yes. Our team can dismantle beds, wardrobes, dining tables, and other large furniture items at your current property and reassemble them at your new home.
Can you move fragile or valuable items safely? +
Absolutely. We use professional wrapping materials, protective blankets, and careful handling techniques to ensure fragile items such as mirrors, artwork, glassware, and electronics arrive safely.
Do you cover areas outside Birmingham? +
Yes. While we are based in Birmingham, we cover the entire West Midlands region including Solihull, Wolverhampton, Walsall, Coventry, Dudley, and surrounding areas.

Ready for a Royal Move?

Get your free, no-obligation quote in under 2 minutes. Fill out the quick form or call us directly. Our team responds in 10 to 15 minutes.
